title: Request Refund - StablePay

form.heading: Request a Refund
form.subheading: Fill out the form below to submit a refund request. The merchant will review and process your request.

orderId.label: ORDER ID
orderId.hint: You can find this in your payment confirmation email

email.label: EMAIL ADDRESS
email.hint: Must match the email from your original order

amount.label: REFUND AMOUNT (USD)
amount.hint: Enter the amount you wish to refund (partial refunds allowed)

reason.label: REASON FOR REFUND
reason.placeholder: Please explain why you're requesting a refund...

success.heading: Refund Request Submitted
success.subheading: Your request has been sent to the merchant for review.

next.heading: What happens next?
next.s1: 1. The merchant will review your request
next.s2: 2. If approved, they will send the refund to your wallet
next.s3: 3. You'll receive the funds at the same wallet address you paid from

check.heading: Check Existing Request
check.placeholder: Enter refund ID to check status

footer: Powered by StablePay - Crypto Payments Made Simple
